notes: 7G7 item 5. Differentiates from ts-connect4 per catalog: bitboard representation + perft differential verification, explicitly no bot. All perft counts (start 7^1..7^6; '000000' 6/36/216/1296/7776/45936; '334455' 7/35/245/1295/8712/48242 — depth-2 = 35 proves win-terminal pruning; '33443535' 7/49/328/2165/13357/85429), raw encodings (red 0x810200000 / yel 0x1020400000 for '334455'), and shift-detector masks computed by an independent Python oracle of the stated rules.
